title: onoseris bracteata
intro: Onoseris bracteata is a plant species in the family Compositae, commonly known as a shrub or subshrub. The plant is used in traditional medicine, with its roots and leaves possessing medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onoseris bracteata include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
